description: A designed text card on a dark navy background. Small white capitals at the top read 'OFFICE OF THE FIRST LADY', followed by a large white serif headline 'First Lady Melania Trump: America's Tradition Fosters Unity', with 'The White House' and the date 'May 19, 2026' beneath.
notable_text: OFFICE OF THE FIRST LADY; First Lady Melania Trump: America's Tradition Fosters Unity; The White House; May 19, 2026
